description: Implement Execution/AiMergeResolver over IPromptRunner with the NEW GUARDRAILS_MERGE_BASE/_OURS/_THEIRS/_OUT on-disk env contract and a distinct ai-merge prompt profile, the two deterministic checks (no markers via git diff --check; blast-radius via git status --porcelain), the 1-retry budget + needs-human escalation, and wire it into the §4 union path OFF the global lock with the verdict = the IReVerifier re-verify (colliding siblings' FULL set unconditionally - B-3) - making AiMergeWorkerTests pass without editing them
